intent: Load the HF Search page, browse the 2025-2026 quick picks, type a query, pick filters, and hand off a selected model to the Planner.

steps.blind_description: Terminal showing monospaced output with a block of numeric columns. (frame slug: landing)
steps.intent: HF Search landed; Quick picks grid visible with 2025-2026 releases and download-count badges.

steps.blind_description: Command-line prompt with recently-emitted lines of hex-coloured log output. (frame slug: search-typed)
steps.intent: User types "llama" into the search box; quick picks remain visible above.

steps.blind_description: Dark terminal displaying a table of CLI results and a blinking cursor at the bottom. (frame slug: results)
steps.intent: Search returned; results table shows models with downloads, likes, library, tags, and last-modified.

steps.blind_description: Shell session showing a command header and a paragraph of structured stdout. (frame slug: model-actions)
steps.intent: Per-row actions visible: each model exposes a "Plan it →" button that primes the Planner session.

steps.blind_description: Terminal window with a list-style summary and no visible error indicator. (frame slug: handoff-planner)
steps.intent: Handoff complete: Planner opens with the chosen model id banner at the top.
